crime.quote: the investigation into the murder of Major Parker is a joint project

victim.value: Major Conrad Parker, red-haired soldier who killed Native Americans including Charles Lean Bear's mother
victim.quote: Conrad Parker is dead. In a way your mother's death is revenged

culprit_and_motive.value: Someone Parker offended, motive of revenge for past wrongs
culprit_and_motive.quote: not by you, but by someone who Parker also offended

resolution.value: McKenzie identifies Parker through photograph confirmation with witness Charles Lean Bear
resolution.quote: It is him. Is he the one that is dead, the one the one you asked me about months ago?

investigator.value: Alan McKenzie, working jointly with Detective Sergeant Patrick O'Malley
investigator.quote: Back in Washington McKenzie reported on what had transpired with the New York Police Department

suspect_architecture.value: Two primary suspects mentioned: Henderson (being actively pursued) and an unnamed perpetrator who killed Parker for personal offense
suspect_architecture.quote: Right now, I have two, possible suspects. Let's have another coffee and dessert and I'll bring you up to date

red_herring.value: Charles Lean Bear/Avanaco appears positioned as false suspect due to revenge motive for mother's death
red_herring.quote: It is him. Is he the one that is dead, the one the one you asked me about months ago?

clue_fairness.value: Photograph with hair color discrepancy provided as evidence - Parker's red hair appears black in newspaper photo
clue_fairness.quote: In the picture his hair and beard appear black. I know it as red, bright red, but still it is him.

social_world.value: Military hierarchy with Colonel Willett overseeing investigation, joint police cooperation between federal and local authorities
social_world.quote: Back in Washington McKenzie reported on what had transpired with the New York Police Department

alibi.value: Henderson's location tracked to Dallas boarding house, establishing whereabouts investigation
alibi.quote: I thought you said he was in Dallas. I hope he still is.

reveal_mechanic.value: Visual identification through photograph comparison revealing hair color discrepancy as key evidence
reveal_mechanic.quote: McKenzie reached into his jacket pocket and removed a newspaper clipping which contained the photograph

media_and_audience.value: Newspaper coverage connecting the hearing with Parker's murder, requiring official response about joint investigation
media_and_audience.quote: your hearing along with Parker's murder will be connected and the story will appear in the newspapers

investigator_wound.value: McKenzie's personal investment in providing closure to Charles Lean Bear for his mother's death at Washita River
investigator_wound.quote: I came here Charles to show this and hopefully to give you peace. Conrad Parker is dead.

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton warrior song
